     The Numbers Business Report

I am Number Four (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $55,100,437Details
International Box Office $91,094,722
Worldwide Box Office $146,195,159
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $14,736,560
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,298,026
Total $21,034,586
Further financial details...

Synopsis

"I Am Number Four" is a suspense thriller about an extraordinary young man, John Smith, who is a fugitive on the run from ruthless enemies sent to destroy him. Changing his identity, moving from town to town with his guardian Henri, John is always the new kid with no ties to his past. In the small Ohio town he now calls home, John encounters unexpected, life-changing events - his first love, powerful new abilities and a connection to the others who share his incredible destiny.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$19,449,893 (35.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.83 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:37.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,154 opening theaters/3,156 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $83,102,302

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 18th, 2011 (Wide) by Walt Disney
February 18th, 2011 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: March 11th, 2011 (Wide) (Central America)
Video Release: May 24th, 2011 by Dreamworks Video, released as I Am Number Four
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence and action, and for language.
(Rating bulletin 2151, 12/15/2010)
PG-13 for intense sequences of violence and action, and for brief language.
(Rating bulletin 2152, 12/22/2010)
Running Time: 114 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue, Visual Effects, Voiceover/Narration
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Bullies, Coming of Age, Friendly Alien on Earth, New Guy/Girl in School, Romance, Secret Identity
Social setting: Alien Invasion
Source material: Young Adult Book Adaptation
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Reliance BIG Entertainment, Bay Films, DreamWorks Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

"I Am Number Four" is a suspense thriller about an extraordinary young man, John Smith, who is a fugitive on the run from ruthless enemies sent to destroy him. Changing his identity, moving from town to town with his guardian Henri, John is always the new kid with no ties to his past. In the small Ohio town he now calls home, John encounters unexpected, life-changing events - his first love, powerful new abilities and a connection to the others who share his incredible destiny.
